allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('raw_count:', d.get\('raw_count'\)\); print\('accepted:', len\(d.get\('data',d.get\('accepted',[]\)\)\)\); print\('rejected:', len\(d.get\('rejected',[]\)\)\); print\('provider_breakdown keys:', list\(d.get\('provider_breakdown',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('accepted:', d.get\('accepted_count'\)\); print\('rejected:', d.get\('rejected_count'\)\); print\('raw:', d.get\('raw_count'\)\); pbd=d.get\('provider_breakdown',{}\); [print\(k,'→',v.get\('raw_count'\),v.get\('status'\)\) for k,v in pbd.items\(\)]")
